zh.Of Bickerton, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德比可頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Fulleshurst於大約1278年出生在英國英格蘭爾艾格頓時，她的父親Richard Fouleshurst28歲，母親Ellen25歲。她於1295年與David de Egerton在英國爾馬爾帕斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1340年在英國爾艾格頓享年63歲。

zh-hans.Of Bickerton, England: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德比可頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Fulleshurst于大约1278年出生在英国英格兰爾艾格頓时，她的父亲Richard Fouleshurst28岁，母亲Ellen25岁。她于1295年与David de Egerton在英国爾馬爾帕斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1340年在英国爾艾格頓享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Fulleshurst was born about 1278, in Egerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Fouleshurst, was 28 and her mother, Ellen, was 25. She married David de Egerton in 1295, in Malpas, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1340, in Egerton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Fulleshurst est née environ 1278, à Egerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Fouleshurst, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Ellen, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé David d’Egerton en 1295, à Malpas, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1340, à Egerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Fulleshurst um 1278 in Egerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Fouleshurst 28 und ihre Mutter Ellen 25. Sie hat 1295 in Malpas, Cheshire, England David de Egerton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1340 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Egerton, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Fulleshurst è nata il circa 1278 nel Egerton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard Fouleshurst, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Ellen, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato David de Egerton nel 1295, nel Malpas, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1340, nel Egerton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Fulleshurstが約1278年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアエジャートンで生まれた時，父Richard Fouleshurstは28歳，母Ellenは25歳であった。1295年にイギリスチェシュアイアマルプアスでDavid de Egertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1340年にイギリスチェシュアイアエジャートンで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Fulleshurst(이)가 대략 1278년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 거턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Fouleshurst(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1295년 영국 체실르 맬파스에서 David de Egerton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1340년 영국 체실르 거턴에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Fulleshurst nasceu aproximadamente 1278, em Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Fouleshurst, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Ellen, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com David de Egerton em 1295, em Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1340, em Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Fulleshurst родилась около 1278 г. в местности эгиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Fouleshurst было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David de Egerton в 1295 г. в местности малпас, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1340 г. в местности эгиртон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Fulleshurst nació aproximadamente 1278, en Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Fouleshurst, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Ellen, tenía 25 años. Se casó con David de Egerton en 1295, en Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1340, en Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
